summary: The diff shows only 3 files modified: frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts (a URL parameter utility), frontend-file-summaries.txt (a metadata/summary file), and project_state.json (which only updates status fields, still showing all ARs as 'pending'). None of the actual implementation work for REQ-1, REQ-2, or REQ-3 is present in the diff — no changes to GlobalDashboardPage, useQueries.ts, MarketplacePage, RewardsPage, ShopPage, VendorPage, VendorDirectoryPage, DiscoveryHubPage, OrdersPage, WalletPage, AdminPanel, index.css, or tailwind.config.js are included.

missing_requirements.requirement: Wire the GlobalDashboardPage analytics data to live backend calls replacing mock/static values for views, clicks, active campaigns, reward pools, and ad revenue with real React Query hooks.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to GlobalDashboardPage or related analytics hooks appear in the diff. The project_state.json still marks AR-1 as 'pending'.

missing_requirements.requirement: Audit all pages still using mock/local data and replace with live React Query hooks; ensure useQueries.ts covers all required backend calls without duplication.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to useQueries.ts or any page components are present in the diff. The project_state.json still marks AR-2 as 'pending'.

missing_requirements.requirement: Apply UI polish across MarketplacePage, RewardsPage, ShopPage, VendorPage, VendorDirectoryPage, DiscoveryHubPage, OrdersPage, WalletPage, and AdminPanel using OKLCH design tokens, fixing spacing, typography, badge styles, and card layouts.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to any of the listed page components, index.css, or tailwind.config.js are present in the diff. The project_state.json still marks AR-3 as 'pending'.

hallucinated_features.description: URL parameter persistence utility (urlParams.ts) with functions for extracting URL params from hash-based routing, storing/retrieving from sessionStorage, and clearing params from URL hash.
hallucinated_features.reason: This utility was not requested in any of the three requirements (REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-3) and is not mentioned in the build request scope.
